EICAR Test File.description: EICAR standard antivirus test file detected.

Reverse Shell (Bash).description: Reverse shell connection detected via bash.

Reverse Shell (Netcat).description: Reverse shell connection detected via netcat.

Reverse Shell (Python).description: Reverse shell connection detected via Python.

Reverse Shell (PHP).description: Reverse shell connection detected via PHP.

Reverse Shell (PowerShell).description: Reverse shell connection detected via PowerShell.

Data Exfiltration (Curl/Wget).description: Piping internet download directly into shell.

Data Exfiltration (Sensitive Files).description: Exfiltrating sensitive local files via curl/wget.

Suspicious Curl/Wget Execution.description: Suspicious curl or wget command downloading and/or executing potentially malicious files.

Obfuscated Base64 String.description: Large base64 string or decoding function indicating obfuscation.

Hex-Encoded Payload.description: Sequence of hex-encoded bytes often used for shellcode.

Suspicious C2 Server IP.description: IP address with suspicious port commonly used by command-and-control servers.

System Hosts File Modification.description: Modification of system hosts file for DNS redirection.

Windows Registry Modification.description: Windows registry modification, potentially for persistence.

SSH Key Manipulation.description: Adding keys to authorized_keys for backdoor access.
